lines.en_lit: And some say: Ridya as well. And the Sages asked for mercy the soul at the moment that it leaves the body and eliminated it.

was taught in accordance with of Rabbi Sheila: one who sets out on the path before keriat hagever his blood is on his head, Rabbi Yoshiya says: until twice. And some say: Until he three times. And with regard to what rooster did state a rooster medium

Rav Yehuda said Rav said: When the Jewish people ascend for the pilgrimage they stand crowded, but bow spaced And they extend eleven cubits behind the Hall of the Ark Cover, What is he saying this is what he is saying: Even though extend eleven cubits behind the Hall of the Ark Cover and stand crowded, when they bow, they bow spaced. And that is one of the ten miracles that were performed in the Temple.

As we learned Ten miracles were performed in the Temple. No woman miscarried from the aroma of the sacrificial meat, And the sacrificial meat never putrefied. And no fly was seen in the slaughterhouse, And a seminal emission did not befall the High Priest on Yom Kippur. And no disqualification was found in the omer or the two loaves, or in the shewbread. stand crowded but bow spaced. And neither a snake nor a scorpion ever harmed in Jerusalem. And a person never said to another: There is no room for me to stay overnight in Jerusalem.

opened in the Temple, and closed in Jerusalem. There are two other in the Temple, as it was taught Rain never extinguished the fire of the arrangement of wood And the smoke of the arrangement, even if all the winds in the world come and blow it, they do not move it from its place

And are there no more But didn’t Rav Shemaya teach Kalnevo: Shards of earthenware vessels were swallowed in their places, Abaye said: The crop and feathers and the ashes of the inner altar, and the ashes of the candelabrum, were swallowed in their places.

The disqualifications were three; consider them as one Eliminate two and introduce two If the swallowing are also two considered as one, they are lacking There is also another as Rabbi Yehoshua ben Levi said: A great miracle was performed with regard to the shewbread its removal as its arrangement, as it is stated: “To put out hot bread on the day it was taken away”

And were there no more But didn’t Rabbi Levi say this matter is a tradition we from our ancestors: The place of the Ark is not in the measurement And Rabbenai said Shmuel said: through a miracle cherubs would stand.

counts miracles that outside does not count miracles that inside If so, the shewbread is also a miracle inside The shewbread was a miracle outside, as Reish Lakish said: What is which is written: on the pure table pure, by inference that it indicates that it impure
